---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem / motivation

What problem does this feature solve? Who is affected, and how often?

## Proposed solution

A clear description of what you would like to see. Mock-ups, links to
similar implementations, or pseudocode are welcome.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why you discarded them.

## Scope

- [ ] Fits the existing architecture (core / platform / marketing)
- [ ] No external services required
- [ ] Can ship behind a feature flag if experimental

## Additional context

Anything else relevant — related issues, use cases, or examples from
other tools.
